name: Demo Quant Alpha — Conservative Defensive

strategy.summary: Stablecoin-anchored defensive rotation across USDC.e / WETH / W0G on Jaine V3. Maximum 40% single-asset exposure, 60% confidence floor, sealed mode mandatory. Built as the canonical demo operator for the V4 marketplace cutover.
strategy.thesis: Defensive-first sizing — never more than 40% in any non-base asset, never trade below 60% AI confidence, and never trade through the mempool. Every intent is EIP-712 bound to a TEE-attested GLM-5-FP8 inference response via ExecutionIntent.attestationReportHash, and committed before reveal via sealed mode to defeat MEV.

fees.note: Fees in basis points (1 bps = 0.01%). Demo-tier fees, well under the on-chain caps (perf 3000, mgmt 500, entry 200, exit 200).

inputs: 15m / 1h / 4h OHLCV for USDC.e/WETH and USDC.e/W0G on Jaine V3
outputs: action: BUY | SELL | HOLD per asset pair

attestation.mechanism: TEE-signed ECDSA over keccak256(provider, chatId, model, contentDigest)

contractEnforced: confidenceThresholdBps floor (6000) — vault rejects intents below 60% confidence
maxPositionBps ceiling (4000) — vault rejects sizing above 40% of NAV
stopLossBps trigger (1000) — position auto-exit on 10% drawdown
cooldownSeconds (1200) — vault rejects intents within 20 minutes of last trade
maxActionsPerDay (4) — vault rejects after 4 executed trades in 24h
both-sides asset whitelist — assetIn AND assetOut must be USDC.e, WETH, or W0G
commit-reveal block gap — sealed mode requires >= 1 block between commit and reveal
attestedSigner signature match — ecrecover must match policy.attestedSigner
V4 manifest binding — intent.strategyHash must equal vault.acceptedManifestHash
operatorSide: STRICT_MODE=1 refuses trade on stale market data or 0G Compute failure
Orchestrator re-fetches Pyth prices every cycle (oracle freshness gate)
CoinGecko fallback disabled under strict mode
TEE signer key stored separately from hot executor key (config invariant)

slashConditions: Trading any asset outside the declared allowedAssets list
Signing inferences not actually produced by zai-org/GLM-5-FP8
Bypassing stop-loss, cooldown, or maxActionsPerDay via post-publish policy override
Collusion with MEV infrastructure outside the committed commit-reveal scheme
Failure to publish a new bonded manifest when strategy materially changes
disclosures: Operator hot wallet key is separate from TEE signer key (enforced in orchestrator config).
No off-chain inputs beyond those listed in ai.inputs.
Stake bonded in OperatorStaking at 0xF46b6b76c5021a21dc0029FDEAEba6713472CBE6 (V4 marketplace).
Arbitrator: AegisGovernor multisig at 0x023EC4a54435f94E9395460e4835e75E429D5A2e — can slash up to 50% of stake per 7-day rolling window.
